modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to know how often to send docs to Accessibility

full_description_text: So, like, I was chatting with someone about this thing. They wanna know how often they gotta send new papers to the Office of Accessibility. It’s kinda confusing, right? I mean, do they do it every month or just when they feel like it? Just trying to figure it out, you know?
short_description: Need to know how often to send docs to Accessibility
description: So, like, I was chatting with someone about this thing. They wanna know how often they gotta send new papers to the Office of Accessibility. It’s kinda confusing, right? I mean, do they do it every month or just when they feel like it? Just trying to figure it out, you know?
